summary: Frontend-only surgical verification for the HRMS Policy/Early-Out/Payroll production update. All 5 requested checks pass at the primary UI level (Late Coming table row, Employee Early Out dialog+table, Admin Early Out table+apply+edit+view, Payroll Holiday Pay column + math + FD/OH/HD codes, Late Request unchanged). Verified end-to-end: (1) Research Unit policy → table row 'Late Coming (LC)' Intimation Window now reads EXACTLY 'Before 10:00 AM (max 10:30 AM)'; the '9:45' string does NOT appear in the LC row of that table. (2) /employee/early-out: apply-early-out-btn opens dialog with only 'Actual Logout Time' — no 'Expected'; requests table columns are DATE / ACTUAL TIME / REASON / STATUS / LOP / ACTIONS (no Expected). Submit flow verified: POST /api/early-out-requests returned 200 with a response body that contains actual_time='17:30' and no expected_time key, toast 'Submitted' shown, row appears in table. (3) /early-out-requests (admin): admin-early-out-page testid present; table columns EMPLOYEE / TEAM / DATE / ACTUAL / REASON / STATUS / LOP / ACTIONS (no Expected). 'Apply for Employee' dialog contains ONLY 'Actual Time' (no Expected). Edit dialog (edit-eo-dialog) contains ONLY 'Actual Time'. View sheet (view-eo-*) inner text also has no 'Expected'. (4) /payroll (Attendance View) with Jun 2026 selected: 61 rows loaded, header order confirmed as … Weekoff Pay | Extra Pay | Holiday Pay | LOP | Payable Days (Holiday Pay correctly between Extra Pay and LOP); math reconciled Working + Weekoff + Holiday − LOP = Payable for 10 sampled rows, 0 mismatches (Extra Pay correctly EXCLUDED from Payable); daily cells render FD, HD, OH, PF, PA, LC, EH, WO, R, Su codes; approved-with-LOP correctly shows leave code (e.g., Aparna A row shows 'PF' cells rather than generic 'LOP'). (5) /employee/late-request: table still has EXPECTED TIME column and dialog still has BOTH 'Expected Login Time' and 'Actual Login Time' fields — module correctly UNTOUCHED.

ui_bugs.issue:
React hydration warning in console: '
cannot be a descendant of

' — the Badge component (renders a

) is nested inside a

at AdminEarlyOut.js line 269-270 (inside the 'Employee: {name} — {status}' line). Functional flow works but console emits a warning every time the Edit dialog opens.

design_issues.screen: Policies → 'BluBridge — HR Induction, Company Conduct & Leave Policy (Research Unit)'
issues: POLICY-TEXT INCONSISTENCY: The table under section 4 (Leave Policy & Attendance Compliance) was correctly updated so the LC row now reads 'Before 10:00 AM (max 10:30 AM)'. However, later in the SAME policy body there is a duplicate plain-text bullet list that still says: 'Late Coming (LC) — Must inform before 9:45 AM (latest by 10:00 AM); should include expected arrival time.' This bullet was NOT updated and now contradicts the table. Source likely in policy content string (search for the literal 'before 9:45 AM (latest by 10:00 AM)'). Two other '9:45' occurrences on the page refer to Emergency Leave (9:45–10:00 AM window) and are expected/correct.

action_items: [MEDIUM] Update the duplicate Late Coming bullet in the Research Unit policy body (outside the section 4 table) from 'Must inform before 9:45 AM (latest by 10:00 AM)' to match the new table copy 'Must inform before 10:00 AM (max 10:30 AM)' — currently the same document contradicts itself.

[LOW] Fix React DOM-nesting warning in AdminEarlyOut.js line 269-270: replace the outer

that wraps (a

) with a
or a so the Badge no longer sits inside a

. No functional impact but noise in every session's console.
critical_code_review_comments: Payroll.js correctly moved 'Holiday Pay' (emp.oh_pay) between 'Extra Pay' and 'LOP' in both the CSV export header (~line 165) and the on-screen table header (~line 365). The visible math holds across 10 sampled rows for Jun 2026: work + weekoff + holiday − lop === final_payable_days.

The footnote text (Payroll.js ~line 506) explicitly reads 'Payable Days = Working Days + Weekoff Pay + Extra Pay + Holiday Pay - LOP' even though the actual formula EXCLUDES Extra Pay. This matches the E1's spec ('confirm the footnote reads … Extra Pay + Holiday Pay - LOP') so it is intentional, but consider adding a small note like 'Extra Pay shown separately, not included in Payable Days' if user confusion is a risk.

EarlyOutRequest UI (both admin & employee) is now clean of expected_time — no stale label, no residual empty column, no layout gap. Historical DB rows with expected_time are simply not rendered, matching requirement.
Late Request module remains fully intact — good discipline in keeping the surgical update scoped only to Early Out.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only test as instructed; main agent already verified 40 payroll pytest + curl POST + reconciliation)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on functional flows (5/5). 1 non-blocking design/content inconsistency and 1 low-severity DOM-nesting console warning noted.

test_credentials: admin/HrAdmin786$ (HR) OK; user/pass123 (Rishi S Nayak — Business & Product) OK
seed_data_creation: 1 pending Early Out request created as user/pass123 to prove the submit flow works (id 766a30cb-d08a-4f95-9a78-bc8fb436eedd, date 2026-07-01, actual_time 17:30, reason 'TEST_agent: Personal work'). Attempted admin cleanup via DELETE/approve/reject/status endpoints — all returned 405/404 (no obvious REST cleanup route). Left in DB as pending with a 'TEST_agent' reason prefix for easy identification. Main agent can drop it via mongo shell or reject/approve UI action if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The only functional issue found is a policy-content inconsistency (duplicate LC bullet still says 9:45); everything else in the surgical update — Early Out expected-time removal (admin + employee, table + apply + edit + view), Payroll Holiday Pay column between Extra Pay and LOP, Payable = Work+Weekoff+Holiday−LOP with Extra Pay excluded, FD/HD/OH/leave-code renders, Late Request untouched — is verified working. Payroll page loaded in <5s in this run (way faster than the 40-90s the E1 warned about); the wait-for-rows loop was added anyway. When cleaning up the TEST_agent pending Early Out entry, note there is no DELETE endpoint on /api/early-out-requests/{id} — the workflow is likely 'admin approves/rejects with is_lop payload' via a different route (worth documenting).
rca of the issue: Duplicate LC bullet inconsistency: the Research Unit policy content is composed of TWO parallel representations of the same rules — a structured table (section 4 'Leave Policy & Attendance Compliance') and a plain-text bullet section further down. The E1 patch updated only the table cell. Both sections should be kept in lock-step, or better, the bullet section should be removed / driven from the same data source to avoid future drift. No RCA needed for any code bug — the code-level requirements were met.
